theme: Bash skripting II — getopts, trap, set -e, xato boshqaruvi (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Exit kod ($?)
tasks.why: Har buyruq exit kod qoldiradi: 0=OK, ≠0=xato. Avtomatikaning asosi.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-08/work
Muvaffaqiyatli buyruq kodini yoz:  ls /etc >/dev/null; echo $? > rc.txt

tasks.title: Qattiq rejim (set -e)
tasks.why: set -e — birinchi xatoда skript to'xtaydi. Xavfsiz skript.
steps: strict.sh yarat: 1-qator #!/bin/bash, 2-qator  set -e, keyin  echo 'tugadi'
Ishlat:  bash strict.sh

tasks.title: Argument soni ($#)
steps: args.sh yarat:  echo $#   (argumentlar sonini chiqarsin)
Sinab ko'r:  bash args.sh a b c   → 3

tasks.title: Hamma argument ("$@")
steps: all.sh yarat:  for x in "$@"; do echo $x; done
Sinab ko'r:  bash all.sh x y   → x va y

tasks.title: Default qiymat (${1:-})
steps: def.sh yarat:  echo "Salom, ${1:-mehmon}"
Argumentsiz ishlat:  bash def.sh   → 'Salom, mehmon'

tasks.title: Flaglar (getopts)
tasks.why: getopts — professional flaglar (-n agent). Argumentdan kuchliroq.
steps: opt.sh yarat: -n flag qabul qilib, 'Name: <qiymat>' chiqarsin
while getopts "n:" o; do case $o in n) name=$OPTARG;; esac; done; echo "Name: $name"
Sinab ko'r:  bash opt.sh -n agent   → 'Name: agent'

tasks.title: Tozalash (trap)
tasks.why: trap — skript tugaganда (xato bo'lsa ham) tozalash ishini bajaradi.
steps: trap.sh yarat:  trap 'echo tozalandi' EXIT   keyin  echo ish
Ishlat:  bash trap.sh   → 'ish' keyin 'tozalandi'

tasks.title: Funksiya (qo'shish)
steps: f.sh yarat:  add() { echo $(( $1 + $2 )); }   keyin  add 2 3
Ishlat:  bash f.sh   → 5

tasks.title: Argument tekshiruvi
tasks.why: Robust skript argumentni tekshiradi: bo'sh bo'lsa to'xtaydi.
steps: v.sh yarat: $1 bo'sh bo'lsa 'arg kerak' deb exit 1; aks holda 'ok: $1'
if [ -z "$1" ]; then echo 'arg kerak'; exit 1; fi; echo "ok: $1"
Sinab ko'r:  bash v.sh salom   → 'ok: salom'

tasks.title: Raqamli shart
steps: n.sh yarat:  x=10;  if [ $x -gt 5 ]; then echo katta; else echo kichik; fi
Ishlat:  bash n.sh   → 'katta'

tasks.title: Day-3 ps + robust skript
tasks.why: Day-3 ps + bugungi o'zgaruvchi: jarayonlar sonini olib chiqaradigan skript.
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-08/work && mkdir -p cb
cb/pc.sh yarat:  count=$(ps aux | wc -l);  echo "Jarayonlar: $count"
Ishlat:  bash cb/pc.sh

tasks.title: Day-1 find + argument
tasks.why: Day-1 find + bugungi default: papka argumentini olib, fayl sanaydi.
steps: mkdir -p cb
cb/count.sh yarat:  dir=${1:-.};  echo $(find "$dir" -type f | wc -l)
Sinab ko'r:  bash cb/count.sh /etc
tasks.expect: count.sh berilgan papkадаги fayllar sonini chiqaradi

tasks.title: Skeletni qur
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-08/work
mkdir -p tool/bin tool/out

tasks.title: Mustahkam skript yoz
tasks.why: set -e + getopts + default: real darajadagi skript.
steps: tool/bin/greet.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash, set -e): -n flag qabul qilsin
name bo'sh bo'lsa default 'agent'; 'Salom, <name>' chiqarsin
Sinab ko'r:  bash tool/bin/greet.sh -n bob   → 'Salom, bob'

tasks.title: Ishga tushir va saqla
steps: bash tool/bin/greet.sh -n agent > tool/out/result.txt
Ko'r:  cat tool/out/result.txt

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: set -e va trap nima uchun kerakligini (real misol bilan) ustozга ayt
